# TrendCraft

> A TypeScript library for technical analysis of financial data. Calculate indicators, detect signals, backtest strategies, and analyze market trends.

TrendCraft provides 45+ technical indicators, signal detection, backtesting with 50+ preset conditions, strategy optimization, real-time streaming pipelines, and position sizing — all with a consistent `Series<T>` return type.

## Installation

```bash
npm install trendcraft
```

All functions accept candle data in the format `{ time: number | string | Date, open, high, low, close, volume }` and return `Series<T>` (`{ time: number, value: T }[]`).

## Documentation

- [API Reference](https://github.com/sawapi/trendcraft/blob/main/docs/API.md): Complete API documentation with all function signatures, options, and examples
- [README](https://github.com/sawapi/trendcraft/blob/main/README.md): Getting started guide with usage examples

## Quick Start

```typescript
import { sma, rsi, bollingerBands, goldenCross } from 'trendcraft';

// Calculate indicators
const sma20 = sma(candles, { period: 20 });
const rsi14 = rsi(candles, { period: 14 });
const bb = bollingerBands(candles, { period: 20, stdDev: 2 });

// Detect signals
const crosses = goldenCross(candles, { short: 5, long: 25 });

// Fluent API
import { TrendCraft } from 'trendcraft';
const result = TrendCraft.from(candles).sma(20).ema(12).rsi(14).compute();

// Backtesting
import { TrendCraft, goldenCross, deadCross, and, rsiBelow } from 'trendcraft';
const bt = TrendCraft.from(candles)
  .strategy()
    .entry(and(goldenCross(), rsiBelow(30)))
    .exit(deadCross())
  .backtest({ capital: 1000000, stopLoss: 5, takeProfit: 15 });
```

## Indicators

### Moving Averages
- `sma(candles, { period })` — Simple Moving Average
- `ema(candles, { period })` — Exponential Moving Average
- `wma(candles, { period })` — Weighted Moving Average
- `vwma(candles, { period })` — Volume Weighted Moving Average

### Trend
- `ichimoku(candles, opts?)` — Ichimoku Cloud (tenkan, kijun, senkouA, senkouB, chikou)
- `supertrend(candles, { period, multiplier })` — Supertrend with trend direction
- `parabolicSar(candles, opts?)` — Parabolic SAR
- `vortex(candles, { period })` — Vortex Indicator (VI+, VI-)

### Momentum
- `rsi(candles, { period })` — Relative Strength Index (Wilder's smoothing)
- `macd(candles, { fast, slow, signal })` — MACD (macd, signal, histogram)
- `stochastics(candles, opts?)` — Stochastic Oscillator (%K, %D)
- `fastStochastics(candles, opts?)` / `slowStochastics(candles, opts?)` — Fast/Slow variants
- `stochRsi(candles, opts?)` — Stochastic RSI
- `dmi(candles, { period })` — DMI/ADX (+DI, -DI, ADX)
- `cci(candles, { period })` — Commodity Channel Index
- `williamsR(candles, { period })` — Williams %R
- `roc(candles, { period })` — Rate of Change
- `trix(candles, { period })` — Triple EMA oscillator
- `aroon(candles, { period })` — Aroon Up/Down/Oscillator

### Volatility
- `bollingerBands(candles, { period, stdDev })` — Bollinger Bands (upper, middle, lower, %B, bandwidth)
- `atr(candles, { period })` — Average True Range (Wilder's)
- `donchianChannel(candles, { period })` — Donchian Channel
- `keltnerChannel(candles, opts?)` — Keltner Channel
- `chandelierExit(candles, { period, multiplier })` — Chandelier Exit trailing stops
- `volatilityRegime(candles, opts?)` — Classify volatility (low/normal/high/extreme)

### Volume
- `obv(candles)` — On Balance Volume
- `mfi(candles, { period })` — Money Flow Index
- `vwap(candles, opts?)` — Volume Weighted Average Price
- `cmf(candles, { period })` — Chaikin Money Flow
- `volumeMa(candles, { period })` — Volume Moving Average
- `volumeAnomaly(candles, opts?)` — Volume spike detection
- `volumeProfile(candles, opts?)` — Volume Profile (POC, VAH, VAL)
- `volumeProfileSeries(candles, opts?)` — Rolling Volume Profile series
- `volumeTrend(candles)` — Volume trend confirmation
- `adl(candles)` — Accumulation/Distribution Line

### Price
- `highest(candles, { period })` / `lowest(candles, { period })` — Highest/Lowest values
- `returns(candles)` / `cumulativeReturns(candles)` — Price returns
- `pivotPoints(candles, opts?)` — Pivot Points (support/resistance)
- `swingPoints(candles, opts?)` — Swing highs and lows
- `fibonacciRetracement(candles, opts?)` — Fibonacci retracement levels

### Smart Money Concepts (SMC)
- `orderBlock(candles, opts?)` — Order Block detection
- `liquiditySweep(candles, opts?)` — Liquidity Sweep detection
- `breakOfStructure(candles, opts?)` — Break of Structure (BOS)
- `changeOfCharacter(candles, opts?)` — Change of Character (CHoCH)
- `fairValueGap(candles, opts?)` — Fair Value Gap (FVG)

### Drawing Tools
- `autoTrendLine(candles, opts?)` — Auto trend line detection
- `channelLine(candles, opts?)` — Channel line detection
- `fibonacciExtension(candles, opts?)` — Fibonacci extension levels
- `andrewsPitchfork(candles, opts?)` — Andrew's Pitchfork

### Other
- `heikinAshi(candles)` — Heikin-Ashi candles
- `superSmoother(candles, opts?)` — Ehlers Super Smoother filter
- `roofingFilter(candles, opts?)` — Ehlers Roofing filter
- `benchmarkRS(candles, benchmark, opts?)` — Relative Strength vs benchmark
- `calculateAtrPercent(candles)` — ATR as percentage of price

## Signals

### Cross Detection
- `crossOver(seriesA, seriesB)` / `crossUnder(seriesA, seriesB)` — Generic crossover detection
- `goldenCross(candles, { short, long })` / `deadCross(candles, { short, long })` — MA crosses
- `validateCrossSignals(candles, signals, opts?)` — Validate crosses with volume/trend confirmation

### Divergence Detection
- `rsiDivergence(candles, opts?)` — RSI divergence (bullish/bearish)
- `macdDivergence(candles, opts?)` — MACD divergence
- `obvDivergence(candles, opts?)` — OBV divergence
- `detectDivergence(candles, indicator, opts?)` — Generic divergence detection

### Pattern Detection
- `bollingerSqueeze(candles, opts?)` — Low volatility squeeze
- `perfectOrder(candles, opts?)` / `perfectOrderEnhanced(candles, opts?)` — Perfect Order detection
- `rangeBound(candles, opts?)` — Range-bound market detection
- `volumeBreakout(candles, opts?)` / `volumeAccumulation(candles, opts?)` — Volume patterns

### Price Patterns
- `doubleTop(candles, opts?)` / `doubleBottom(candles, opts?)` — Double top/bottom
- `headAndShoulders(candles, opts?)` / `inverseHeadAndShoulders(candles, opts?)` — H&S patterns
- `cupWithHandle(candles, opts?)` — Cup with handle pattern
- `candlestickPatterns(candles, opts?)` — Candlestick pattern recognition

### TradeSignal (Unified Format)
- `fromCrossSignal(signal, opts?)` — Convert cross signal to TradeSignal
- `fromDivergenceSignal(signal, opts?)` — Convert divergence signal to TradeSignal
- `fromSqueezeSignal(signal, opts?)` — Convert squeeze signal to TradeSignal
- `fromPatternSignal(signal, opts?)` — Convert pattern signal to TradeSignal
- `createSignalEmitter(opts?)` — Event-based signal emission

### Signal Lifecycle
- `createSignalManager(opts?)` — Manage signal cooldown, debounce, and expiry
- `processSignalsBatch(signals, manager)` — Batch signal processing

## Backtesting

```typescript
import { TrendCraft, runBacktest } from 'trendcraft';

// Fluent API
const result = TrendCraft.from(candles)
  .strategy()
    .entry(goldenCross())
    .exit(deadCross())
  .backtest({ capital: 1000000, stopLoss: 5, takeProfit: 15 });

// Functional API
const result = runBacktest(candles, {
  entry: goldenCross(),
  exit: deadCross(),
  capital: 1000000,
});
```

**BacktestResult** includes: `totalReturnPercent`, `winRate`, `maxDrawdown`, `sharpeRatio`, `profitFactor`, `trades[]`, and more.

### Condition Combinators
- `and(...conditions)` / `or(...conditions)` / `not(condition)` — Combine conditions

### Preset Conditions (50+)
- **MA**: `goldenCrossCondition()`, `deadCrossCondition()`, `priceAboveSma(period)`, `priceBelowSma(period)`
- **RSI**: `rsiBelow(threshold)`, `rsiAbove(threshold)`
- **MACD**: `macdCrossUp()`, `macdCrossDown()`
- **Bollinger**: `bollingerBreakout('upper'|'lower')`, `bollingerTouch('upper'|'lower')`
- **Stochastics**: `stochBelow(val)`, `stochAbove(val)`, `stochCrossUp()`, `stochCrossDown()`
- **DMI/ADX**: `dmiBullish()`, `dmiBearish()`, `adxStrong(threshold?)`
- **Perfect Order**: `perfectOrderBullish()`, `perfectOrderBearish()`, `perfectOrderActiveBullish()`, `poPlusEntry()`, `pbEntry()`
- **Volume**: `volumeAboveAvg(multiplier)`, `volumeAnomalyCondition()`, `volumeConfirmsTrend()`
- **Range**: `rangeBreakout()`, `rangeConfirmed()`, `inRangeBound()`, `tightRange()`
- **Volatility Regime**: `regimeIs('low'|'normal'|'high')`, `volatilityAbove(val)`, `volatilityBelow(val)`
- **MTF**: `weeklyRsiAbove(val)`, `weeklyPriceAboveSma(period)`, `mtfCondition(timeframe, fn)`
- **Patterns**: `doubleTopDetected()`, `doubleBottomDetected()`, `headShouldersDetected()`, `anyBullishPattern()`
- **RS**: `rsAbove(val)`, `rsRising()`, `rsRatingAbove(val)`
- **Fundamentals**: `perBelow(val)`, `pbrBelow(val)`

### Short Selling
Set `direction: 'short'` in backtest options for short selling with direction-aware P&L.

### Risk Management Options
- `stopLoss` / `takeProfit` — Percentage-based
- `trailingStop` — Trailing stop percentage
- `atrRisk: { enabled, period, stopMultiplier, takeProfitMultiplier }` — ATR-based dynamic stops

## Optimization

- `gridSearch(candles, strategyFactory, paramRanges, opts?)` — Parameter optimization via grid search
- `walkForwardAnalysis(candles, strategyFactory, paramRanges, opts?)` — Out-of-sample validation
- `anchoredWalkForwardAnalysis(candles, ...)` — Anchored variant (expanding in-sample window)
- `combinationSearch(candles, entryPool, exitPool, opts?)` — Find optimal entry/exit combinations
- `runMonteCarloSimulation(result, opts?)` — Monte Carlo simulation on backtest results

Helper: `param(name, min, max, step)`, `constraint(fn)`, `getTopResults(result, n)`

## Streaming

Real-time trading pipeline with 6 layers:

```typescript
import { streaming } from 'trendcraft';

// Layer 1: Candle Aggregation
const aggregator = streaming.createCandleAggregator({ interval: 60000 });
aggregator.addTick({ price: 100, volume: 10, timestamp: Date.now() });

// Layer 4: Pipeline (combines indicators + conditions)
const pipeline = streaming.createPipeline({
  indicators: { sma20: { type: 'sma', period: 20 }, rsi14: { type: 'rsi', period: 14 } },
  entry: streaming.and(streaming.smaGoldenCross(20, 50), streaming.rsiBelow(30)),
  exit: streaming.rsiAbove(70),
});
const result = pipeline.update(candle);

// Layer 5: Session with Guards (risk/time management)
const session = streaming.createGuardedSession({
  riskGuard: { maxDailyLoss: 50000, maxOpenPositions: 3 },
  timeGuard: { tradingWindows: [{ start: '09:00', end: '15:00' }] },
});

// Layer 6: Position Management
const managed = streaming.createManagedSession({
  capital: 1000000,
  positionSizing: { method: 'riskBased', riskPercent: 1 },
});
```

**Layers**: 1) Candle Aggregation → 2) Signal Detectors (cross, threshold, squeeze, divergence) → 3) Conditions (combinators) → 4) Pipeline & MTF → 5) Session & Guards → 6) Position Management

## Scoring and Sizing

### Signal Scoring
```typescript
import { ScoreBuilder, calculateScore, scoreAbove } from 'trendcraft';

const config = ScoreBuilder.create()
  .addRsiOversold(30, 2.0)
  .addMacdBullish(1.5)
  .addVolumeSpike(1.5, 1.5)
  .setThresholds(70, 50, 30)
  .build();

const score = calculateScore(candles, index, config);
// { normalizedScore: 0-100, strength: "strong"|"moderate"|"weak"|"none" }
```

Presets: `"momentum"`, `"meanReversion"`, `"trendFollowing"`, `"balanced"`, `"aggressive"`, `"conservative"`

### Position Sizing
- `riskBasedSize(opts)` — Size from risk amount and stop distance
- `atrBasedSize(opts)` — Dynamic stop using ATR
- `kellySize(opts)` — Kelly Criterion optimal sizing
- `fixedFractionalSize(opts)` — Simple percentage allocation

## Data Utilities

### Normalization and Resampling
- `normalizeCandles(candles)` — Normalize various date formats to Unix timestamps
- `resample(candles, 'weekly' | 'monthly')` — Timeframe resampling
- `parseCsv(csvString)` — Parse CSV data to candles

### Validation
- `validateCandles(candles, opts?)` — Run all validation checks (gaps, duplicates, OHLC errors, spikes, volume anomalies)
- `normalizeAndValidate(candles, opts?)` — Normalize + validate in one step
- `detectGaps(candles, opts?)` / `detectDuplicates(candles)` / `detectOhlcErrors(candles)` / `detectPriceSpikes(candles, opts?)` / `detectSplitHints(candles)` — Individual detectors

### Screening
- `screenStock(candles, criteria)` — Screen a single stock against conditions
- `createCriteriaFromNames(entryNames, exitNames)` — Create criteria from preset names
- `CONDITION_PRESETS` — Map of all available preset condition names

### Trade Analysis
- `analyzeAllTrades(trades)` — Comprehensive trade analysis (stats, exit reasons, holding periods, MFE/MAE, streaks)

## Optional

### CLI Tools
- `npx trendcraft-screen ./data --entry "goldenCross"` — Stock screening CLI
- `npx trendcraft-backtest ./data --entry "goldenCross" --exit "deadCross"` — Backtest CLI

### Plugin System
```typescript
import { defineIndicator, TrendCraft } from 'trendcraft';
const myIndicator = defineIndicator({ name: 'myInd', compute: (candles, opts) => ... });
TrendCraft.from(candles).use(myIndicator, opts).compute();
```

### Incremental Indicators
```typescript
import { incremental } from 'trendcraft';
// Stateful, update-one-candle-at-a-time indicators for streaming use
```

### Result Type
All indicators support `Result<Series<T>, TrendCraftError>` via safe variants for robust error handling.

## Types

Key types: `Candle`, `NormalizedCandle`, `Series<T>`, `IndicatorValue<T>`, `TradeSignal`, `BacktestResult`, `BacktestOptions`, `Condition`, `ScoringConfig`, `PipelineOptions`, `PipelineResult`

See [API Reference](https://github.com/sawapi/trendcraft/blob/main/docs/API.md) for complete type definitions.
